app.title: linux-helper
catalog.help: left/right category, up/down move, enter open, ctrl+c quit
detail.run: Press enter or r to fill fields and run
detail.back: Press esc, backspace, or q to go back
detail.favorite_on: Press f to remove from favorites
detail.favorite_off: Press f to add to favorites
form.submit: Press enter or ctrl+s to continue
form.back: Press esc or q to go back
confirm.title: Confirmation required
confirm.approve: Press enter or y to continue
confirm.back: Press esc, backspace, q, or n to cancel
result.back: Press enter, esc, or q to return
